items.title: fix(discord): recover truncated progress finals
items.summary: fix(discord): recover truncated progress finals Summary: - Add shared SDK helpers for transcript-backed recovery of ellipsis-truncated final text. - Use the helper in Discord progress preview delivery so long answers fall through to normal chunked delivery with the full transcript text. - Refactor Telegram to reuse the shared helper. Verification: - node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts - pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.ts src/plugin-sdk/channel-streaming.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/lane-delivery-text-deliverer.ts extensions/telegram/src/lane-delivery.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.process.test.ts - node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo - git diff --check - pnpm check:changed via Blacksmith Testbox tbx_01krsy80a5qgfw790nm45770xt - GitHub PR checks green on #82862 - codex-review --mode local: clean, no accepted/actionable findings Fixes #82807.
